instructions.instruction: **Run Dialyzer in CI** — catch type errors before they reach production
instructions.original_snippets: **Run Dialyzer in CI** — catch type errors before they reach production

instructions.instruction: **Never ignore Dialyzer warnings without documenting why** — use `.dialyzer_ignore.exs`
